content:
Hi Charlotte,
Hope you’re having a good week.
I’m just writing to follow up on the payment forPO POSG0100000724(RMB 8,354.00). I know you kindly confirmed receipt with finance back in November, but we still haven’t received the payment or any update from the accounts team on timing.
Since it’s been a while now, would you be able to help check with them on the current status or expected payment date when you have a moment? Any insight you could share would be really helpful for our planning.
Thanks so much for your help—really appreciate it.

想跟您确认一下，请问修改后的RD77MS样机本周是否已顺利收到？
如顺利收到的话，预计大概什么时候可以给到我们反馈呢？
请查收附件中的发票，并请协助安排付款，谢谢！
I received two links from you, but both have been recalled. Has the file version been updated?
